understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile simultaneously; a level is won when all goal tiles are occupied by selectable pieces.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece in the chosen direction by one cell (3 pixels). Pushable objects adjacent in the movement direction may be pushed along. Walls and other boundaries can block movement, with behavior varying per object. Multiple selectable pieces exist; the active piece can be switched using the CLICK action with the target piece's pixel coordinates. Heuristic hints about blocked directions are provided but may not guarantee failure. Steps are limited per level, requiring efficient action sequences.
